name: Iranian Mainland
description: Primary target of Operation Burning Spear. US/Coalition air campaign targeting IRGC bases, ballistic missile facilities, nuclear enrichment sites, and air defense networks. Israeli strikes destroyed Natanz and Fordow nuclear facilities. IRGC Quds Force Commander Qaani killed in Tehran strike.
strategic_significance: Center of gravity for Operation Burning Spear. Destruction of IRGC military infrastructure and nuclear program is the primary war objective.
civilian_impact: Power grid 60% disrupted, banking offline, telecommunications intermittent

name: Persian Gulf
description: Major naval battlefield. Iran launched 300+ ballistic missiles at US bases in Bahrain, Qatar, and Kuwait. Fattah-2 hypersonic missile penetrated THAAD defenses at Al Udeid. Iran struck Saudi Aramco Ras Tanura and UAE Jebel Ali port, triggering GCC declaration of war.
strategic_significance: Primary theater for Iranian missile retaliation and coalition basing. IRGC sleeper cell bombed Dubai Mall (43 dead). China deploying PLA Navy destroyers.
civilian_impact: Dubai Mall bombing (43 dead), Riyadh residential impact (67 dead), airports closed

name: Strait of Hormuz
description: ACTIVE NAVAL COMBAT ZONE. Iran officially closed the strait and deployed naval mines. IRGC Navy launched 40+ fast boats against USS Eisenhower CSG — 28 boats destroyed, USS Gravely hit by Noor ASCM (12 KIA). Oil at $210/barrel.
strategic_significance: World's most critical energy chokepoint. 21% of global oil disrupted. Navy SEALs captured Iranian minelayer with mine deployment data.
civilian_impact: 21% of global oil supply disrupted, $210/barrel, global shipping crisis

name: Iraq Theater
description: GROUND COMBAT ACTIVE. PMF drone swarm killed 14 US Marines at Al-Asad on Feb 22 — the trigger event for the war. PMF attacked K-1 Air Base and US Embassy Baghdad. Iraqi government demanding US withdrawal.
strategic_significance: The trigger point that started the war. US troops under direct ground assault from Iran-backed militias.
civilian_impact: Embassy evacuation, Green Zone mortar fire, Iraqi civilian casualties from crossfire

name: Red Sea / Bab el-Mandeb
description: ACTIVE ANTI-SHIPPING ZONE. Houthis sank Greek VLCC MV Aegean Titan with Khalij Fars ASBM, creating massive oil spill. All commercial shipping halted. Two of three critical global energy chokepoints denied.
strategic_significance: Second critical energy chokepoint denied. Combined with Hormuz, creates unprecedented energy supply crisis.
civilian_impact: VLCC oil spill, all commercial shipping halted, Yemen humanitarian crisis worsened

name: Lebanon / Northern Front
description: FULL-SCALE ROCKET WAR. Hezbollah launched 3,000 rockets at northern Israel in 24 hours. Haifa port severely damaged. Iron Dome overwhelmed — intercept rate 75%. IDF ground invasion with 30,000+ troops.
strategic_significance: Hezbollah's 130,000+ rocket arsenal is Iran's primary deterrent. IDF launched full ground invasion. Fierce urban combat underway.
civilian_impact: Haifa damaged, northern Israeli cities under fire, Beirut suburbs flattened

name: Cyber Domain
description: Operation Digital Eclipse: US Cyber Command offensive campaign. 60% of Iranian power grid disrupted, banking system offline, IRGC C2 compromised. Iran retaliated with attack on US East Coast power grid.
strategic_significance: Iran retaliated with Charming Kitten attack on US East Coast power grid — 2.3 million without power for 47 minutes. Homeland is now a battlespace.
civilian_impact: US East Coast 2.3M blackout (47 min), Iranian banking offline, internet severely degraded

name: Diplomatic Front
description: UNSC emergency session failed — Russia and China vetoed ceasefire. GCC declared war on Iran. Turkey refused, called for ceasefire. NATO Article 5 consultations. IRGC attempted car bomb at US Embassy Ankara. Global markets in freefall.
strategic_significance: Diplomatic dynamics will determine war duration and termination conditions. Great power tensions rising.
civilian_impact: Global markets in freefall, oil $210/barrel, food supply disruptions beginning
